overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a wooden sailboat drifting across misty waters at dusk, approaching the distant silhouette of a medieval stone fortress. The scene features atmospheric fog, teal-blue color grading, and low-key natural lighting characteristic of The Witcher 3.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty lake approach to ancient fortress shoreline

agents.ego_description: stationary water-level camera tracking the sailboat as it drifts slowly toward the distant castle silhouette

notable_agents.action: wooden sailboat with tan sail drifting from right to left across the frame, creating gentle ripples in the water

entered.detail: medieval stone castle silhouette perched on the misty shoreline, partially obscured by fog
dense dark evergreen trees lining the shore behind the fortress walls
low-lying fog layer hovering above the water surface at the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The camera floats at water level in a wide misty lake, tracking a small wooden sailboat as it drifts toward a distant shore. The ancient stone fortress of Kaer Morhen looms in the foggy background, flanked by dark coniferous forests. The overcast blue-hour sky casts a cool teal tone over the scene, with the boat's tan sail catching subtle warm light as it glides silently across the calm water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a misty lake that gradually draws closer to a looming medieval stronghold. It begins at water level, tracking a small wooden sailboat as it drifts silently through a wide expanse of calm, teal-tinted water. As the boat glides forward, the camera maintains its steady pace, revealing the ancient stone fortress of Kaer Morhen emerging from the dense fog in the distance. The scene then expands to show the fortress flanked by dark coniferous forests under an overcast blue-hour sky, while the tan sail catches a subtle, warm light against the cool atmospheric tones.
